theme_blueprint.description: Unified dual-theme design system for Web and Expo applications.

fonts.heading: Cabinet Grotesk, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif
fonts.body: IBM Plex Sans, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif

components.app_card: bg-token-cardBg border border-token-border rounded-xl shadow-token-shadowCard transition-all duration-200 hover:shadow-token-shadowHover hover:border-token-borderStrong
components.btn_primary: bg-token-primary text-token-primaryInk px-4 py-2 rounded-lg font-medium hover:bg-token-primaryHover active:bg-token-primaryActive transition-colors data-testid="btn-primary"
components.btn_secondary: bg-token-surfaceElevated text-token-textPrimary border border-token-border hover:border-token-borderStrong px-4 py-2 rounded-lg font-medium transition-colors data-testid="btn-secondary"
components.btn_ghost: bg-transparent text-token-textPrimary hover:bg-token-surfaceSecondary px-4 py-2 rounded-lg font-medium transition-colors data-testid="btn-ghost"

status_badge.base: inline-flex items-center px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium border

components.input: bg-token-surface text-token-textPrimary border border-token-border rounded-lg px-4 py-2 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-token-primaryAccentSoft focus:border-token-primaryAccent transition-all placeholder:text-token-textMuted data-testid="input-field"
components.sidebar_item: flex items-center gap-3 px-3 py-2 rounded-lg text-token-textSecondary hover:bg-token-surfaceSecondary hover:text-token-textPrimary transition-colors data-[active=true]:bg-token-primaryAccentSoft data-[active=true]:text-token-primaryAccent data-testid="sidebar-item"
components.modal: bg-token-surfaceElevated border border-token-border rounded-2xl shadow-2xl max-w-lg w-full p-6 data-testid="modal-container"
components.list_row: flex items-center justify-between p-4 border-b border-token-divider hover:bg-token-surfaceSecondary transition-colors

auth_screen_layout.desktop: split-pane. Left side: visual brand container displaying ATLAS DevOS imagery and tone. Right side: auth form container centered vertically and horizontally.
auth_screen_layout.mobile_and_expo: single-column. Form centered, taking up main screen real estate with minimalistic header.

flow.default: Password-first input. Email field followed by password field immediately visible.
flow.tabs: Toggle between 'Sign in' and 'Register' at the top of the form.
flow.links: 'Forgot password?' link strictly placed below the password input field.
flow.supplements: Secondary actions underneath the main login button: 'Continue with Google', 'Try Demo'.

forgot_password_flow.step_1_request: Screen asking for email input with a 'Send Reset Code' button.
forgot_password_flow.step_2_verify: Screen asking for 6-digit code/token sent via email. Must include a 'Resend code' timer/button.
forgot_password_flow.step_3_reset: Screen for 'New password' and 'Confirm password' with a 'Set new password' final button.

migration_checklist: 1. Replace all explicit bg-[#0B0F14] hex classes with semantic bg-token-bg (or bg-app).
2. Strip all hardcoded text hex colors (e.g., text-[#FFFFFF], text-[#A1B0C0]) and apply text-token-textPrimary, text-token-textSecondary, or text-token-textMuted.
3. Swap specific mint green text instances text-[#2FE6A6] with text-token-primaryAccent.
4. Convert generic semi-transparent blocks bg-white/5 to bg-token-surfaceSecondary or bg-token-surfaceElevated.
5. Migrate explicit border-white/10 or similar to border-token-border.
6. Standardize all card containers to use the app-card semantic blueprint classes (bg-token-cardBg border border-token-border...).
7. Update all buttons to match btn-primary, btn-secondary, or btn-ghost classes.
8. Audit all hardcoded spacing and convert to the 4/8/12/16/24/32/48 token scale.
9. Update Typography: Remove font-sans or generic text-xl and apply the standardized hierarchy (text-4xl sm:text-5xl tracking-tight font-bold for H1, etc.).
10. Standardize badge components to the dual-theme status-badge blueprint rather than custom inline background opacities.
11. Convert chart colors to use CSS variables from chart-color-palette (var(--token-primary), etc.).
12. Ensure inputs explicitly define background (bg-token-surface), border (border-token-border), and text (text-token-textPrimary).
13. Add data-[active=true] logic to interactive sidebar or menu items instead of manually swapping bg classes on state changes.
14. Remove raw shadow-[...] classes and implement shadow-token-shadowCard or shadow-token-shadowHover.
15. Replace raw dividers border-b border-[#1A212A] with border-token-divider.
16. Audit SVGs: replace hardcoded hex fills/strokes with currentColor and set text color on the parent.
17. Implement AsyncStorage (Expo) and localStorage (Web) persistence for theme switcher.
18. Sync web tokens file /app/web/src/theme/tokens.js perfectly with Expo tokens file /app/frontend/src/theme/tokens.ts.
19. Test Dark Theme to ensure it perfectly mirrors the original mood but with variables instead of hardcoded values.
20. Test Light Theme to ensure paper-white/slate inversion is fully readable with AAA/AA WCAG contrast.
21. Add data-testid to all newly refactored interactive elements, following the format data-testid="[action]-[element]".
22. Audit modal components across Expo and Web to ensure they use bg-token-surfaceElevated instead of pure dark/light backgrounds.
23. Verify hover states are visible on Light Theme (often neglected when migrating from a Dark-only theme).
24. Create a global theme context/provider for React/Expo that injects CSS variables or React Native StyleSheet dynamically.
25. Ensure standard UI borders do not bleed or glow unintentionally—stick to strict 'institutional' aesthetic.
